titleStmt.title: SII 28.114: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 114. (A.R. No. 269 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, east wall, left of entrance.

Records a Vikkirama-pāṇḍiyak-gāṅgēya-rāyaṉ-ōlai (royal order conveyed through the official so called ?) addressed to the various authorities in the temple of Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār, intimating the grant of a bloc of land consisting of 1 vēli, 8 mā, 3 kāṇi in extent to the temple. It was to be temple-land and was to be made the nagaram to be known as Teriyararaniṉṟa perumāḷ puram of Chōḻiyachchāliyar (weaving community).

1) Below this there is a beginning of another inscription reading l komāṟapaṉmar tiribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ but it is not continued. īt appears that this naṅaram-nattam was to be populated by those to be selected from the naṅarams including Kiḍāraṅṅoṇḍa-chōḻapuram, by three persons (named). The residents of the naṅaram, now settled were to contribute the saree, brand-named vaṅai-kula-dīpan-chēlai and parivaṭṭam for the adornment of the upper portion (tiru-mēl) of ṅoddess Śivakāmasundari-nāchchiyār while she started on procession during the festival (tiruppudiyidu-ttirunāḷ), as also two more inferior sarees (maṭṭa-chchēlai) for the Goddess' attendants (tiru-ppāṅṅimār). Further they were to contribute five ṭiruñāna-sambandaṉ-chiṟu-chchavaḷi-chchēlai as tirukkāsui during each of the festivals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmatkittikkumel komāṟapaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 8 vatu nāḷ Aimpatteḻiṉāl vikkiramapāṇṭiyak kāṅkeyarāyaṉ
Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyiṟ kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārum paṇṭāra pottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum tirukkai Oṭṭi paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu teriya vara
niṉṟaperumāḷ purameṉṉum tiruṉāmattāl Eṟiṉa cāliya ṉakarattukku nattamāṉa nakarattukku Ellaiyāvatu mallikai matai ṉāyaṉār koyilukkum tiruvītikkum kiḻakkum
perumāḷ kuḷattukkut teṉkarai Uṭpaṭṭa nilattukku teṟkum Iṭaṅkai viṉāyakap piḷḷaiyār Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkum kuḷattukkum vaṭakkum Itaṉ kiḻakkuc cellappiḷḷai
tiruppaṇṇiyārappuṟattukkum Ampaṭṭaṉ nilattukkum teṟkkum peruvaḻikku meṟkkum Ammā pirāṉ piḷḷai nilattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉku Ellaiyilum naṭu Uḷ
paṭṭa nilam Oṉṟe mukkāle muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum tiruṉāmattukkāṇi Ākavum teriyavaraṉiṉṟa perumāḷpurameṉṉum tirunāmattāl coḻiyaccāliyaṟku nakaramāvatākavum Iṉta nakarattukkut kiṭāraṅko
ṇṭa coḻapuram Uḷḷiṭṭa nakaraṅkaḷil civapuramuṭaiyāṉ māṇikkak kūttaṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉāṉa teriyavaraniṉṟa perumāḷ nampiyum civapuramuṭaiyāṉ periyaṉāyaṉ varantaruvānāṉa Anantapālanum
Uttaramekapuramuṭaiyāṉ kumarapperumāṉ tirumālāṇṭāṉāna tirucciṟṟampala nampiyum Ivarkaḷ kaippiṭittuk kāṭṭiṉār perākavum Ivarkaḷ Iṉṉāḷ mutal tirupputiyitut tirunāḷukku civakāmacu
ntari nācciyār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷip pukutum potu cātti Eḻuntaruḷip pukutac cāttum Aḷavil vakai kulatīpaṉ celai Oṉṟum Ikkaṭṭaḷaiyil tirumel parivaṭṭam Oṉṟum tiruppāṅkimāṟku maṭṭa
ccelai Iraṇṭum Āka 2 10 5 nālum tirupputiyitut tiruṉāḷtoṟum cevikkavum tirunāḷ Oṉṟukku Aiñcu tiruñāṉacampantaṉ ciṟuccavaḷiccelai tirukkāuci Ākac cevikkavum Ippaṭi tirukkai
oṭṭip paṇṭārattilum mutal koṇṭu vikkirama coḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile kal veṭṭavum paṇṇuvate § Ippaṭi ceyappaṇṇuvate § Ivai vikkirama pāṇṭiyakkāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §On top of this inscription, a portion of another inscription runs as follows: (1"> ha[brā]ṇi viṣṭhāya (2) yate kimiḥ eṉṟu k[o] (3) ṟa ••• •••• kaliṉapa
Digital edition of SII 28.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
